concerns.text: Acceptance Scenario 3 contains corrupted placeholder text: 'logs a `logs a `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION: does <dataset> contain <variable>?]` marker for any dataset...' - nested backticks and unresolvable placeholder markers make this requirement unreadable and untestable.

Edge case contains corrupted text: 'Exclude from analysis and log `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION: does <dataset> contain binary protected attribute?]` for any dataset...' - same placeholder corruption as US-1, plus contradictory statement that target datasets are 'confirmed to contain binary protected attributes' while simultaneously requiring exclusion if they lack them.

Assumption states 'If any dataset lacks a required variable... it will be excluded from analysis and logged as a clarification need' - this contradicts the Edge Case which says to log a '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION...]' marker. The logging mechanism is inconsistent between sections.

FR-002 requires preprocessing to 'extract binary protected attributes' but does not specify behavior when extraction fails (dataset lacks binary protected attribute). This creates ambiguity with the Edge Case exclusion logic.
